headline: A Look At Hartford Insurance Group (HIG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Move
summary: Event overview and recent share performance Hartford Insurance Group (HIG) has drawn fresh attention after a recent move in its share price, with the stock closing at $134.44 and posting a 1 day return of 1.6%. See our latest analysis for Hartford Insurance Group.
